snippet.title: How to Use ChatGPT 5 to Build INSANE Financial Models
snippet.description:
In this video, I show you how to build financial models in minutes using ChatGPT 5 and Excel.

Chat GBT Prompt:

Act as a Chief Financial Officer and Excel modeler. Create and return a downloadable Excel file named "Financial_Model_Scenarios.xlsx". Goal: Build a simple, formula-driven 5-year financial model (2025–2029) for a small manufacturing company with three scenarios: • Base Case – sales grow 3% per year, margin stays constant, costs rise 2%. • US Expansion – sales grow 8% per year, margin improves by 1 point per year, costs rise 3%. • Pessimistic – sales fall 2% per year, margin drops 1 point per year, costs fall 1%. Include the following sheets: 1️⃣ **README** - Short bullet points explaining what each sheet does. - Mention that all calculations are linked and driven by formulas. - Tell users to edit numbers only in the Assumptions sheet. 2️⃣ **P&L_2025** - Base year starting point with the following data: • Revenue = £10,000,000 • COGS = £6,000,000 • Operating Expenses = £2,500,000 - Add formulas: • Gross Profit = Revenue – COGS • EBITDA = Gross Profit – Operating Expenses - Format currency with commas. 3️⃣ **Assumptions** - Columns: Assumption | Base Case | US Expansion | Pessimistic - Include: • Annual Sales Growth % • Gross Margin change (pp/year) • OpEx Growth % - Base Case: 3%, 0.0, 2% - US Expansion: 8%, +1.0, 3% - Pessimistic: –2%, –1.0, –1% 4️⃣ **Scenario Sheets** - Create one sheet per scenario named exactly: “Base Case”, “US Expansion”, “Pessimistic”. - Columns: Metric | 2025 | 2026 | 2027 | 2028 | 2029 - Metrics (rows): Revenue COGS Gross Profit Gross Margin % Operating Expenses EBITDA - The 2025 column must link to ‘P&L_2025’ cells using proper Excel syntax with single quotes, for example: ='P&L_2025'!B2 - Forward-year formulas (for 2026–2029): Revenue_t = previous year × (1 + Sales Growth) GM%_t = GM%_(t-1) + GM change COGS_t = Revenue_t × (1 – GM%) Gross Profit_t = Revenue_t – COGS_t OpEx_t = previous year × (1 + OpEx Growth) EBITDA_t = Gross Profit_t – OpEx_t - Use explicit cell references back to the Assumptions sheet (no named ranges). - When referencing another sheet, **always use Excel syntax with single quotes around the sheet name** (for example: ='Assumptions'!B2). **Do not include @ symbols or structured references.** Formatting & Rules: - Grey header fill. - Currency numbers with thousand separators. - Percentages with one decimal place. - Workbook calculation = Automatic. - No hard-coded values in calculation cells — everything must use formulas. Return the finished Excel file when done.

snippet.title: 🧐👉 ChatGPT में दिखा 'GPT-5 Mini Scout', क्या है ये सीक्रेट अपग्रेड? #QixNewsAI
snippet.description:
OpenAI ने चुपके से कुछ बड़ा किया है! 🤫 हाल ही में ChatGPT के मॉडल सेलेक्टर में 'GPT-5 Mini Scout' नाम का एक नया मॉडल दिखा, जिसने AI की दुनिया में हलचल मचा दी है।

🔍 **क्या है ये नया मॉडल?**
यह मॉडल ChatGPT के एंटरप्राइज वर्जन के 'कंपनी नॉलेज' फीचर से जुड़ा हो सकता है। टेस्टिंग फाइल्स में इसका नाम 'GPT-5.1 Mini' भी सामने आया है।

🚀 **शानदार परफॉरमेंस**
SVG रोबोट बेंचमार्क में इसने जबरदस्त प्रोग्रेस दिखाई है, जिसमें एनिमेटेड रोबोट इमेज बनाने की नई क्षमताएं भी शामिल हैं।

⚔️ **Google Gemini 3 को टक्कर?**
माना जा रहा है कि OpenAI इसे Google के आने वाले Gemini 3 को कड़ी टक्कर देने के लिए तैयार कर रहा है। नवंबर तक इसके लॉन्च होने की उम्मीद है।

यह अपडेट एंटरप्राइज और क्रिएटिव डोमेन के यूजर्स के लिए नई कार्यक्षमताओं और टूल्स का वादा करता है। AI की दुनिया में बड़े बदलाव के लिए तैयार रहें! ✨

snippet.title: ChatGPT 5 vs Gemini 2.5 | The Most Powerful AI Tool of 2025
snippet.description:
In the world of artificial intelligence, two heavyweights are making waves in 2025: ChatGPT 5 and Gemini 2.5. Both tools claim to redefine how we interact with technology, but which one reigns supreme?

ChatGPT 5 offers enhanced conversational abilities, understanding context like never before. It's designed to engage users more naturally, making it ideal for personal and professional use. Imagine seamless dialogue that feels human!

On the other hand, Gemini 2.5 focuses on multi-modal capabilities. This means it processes not just text, but images, videos, and even sounds. Its versatility opens up new creative avenues, making it a strong contender for content creators and businesses alike.

When it comes to integration, both tools are compatible with various platforms. However, ChatGPT 5 excels in real-time applications, while Gemini 2.5 shines in comprehensive analysis, giving users unique advantages depending on their needs.

And let's not forget Abacus AI, which offers a suite of innovative tools that complement both ChatGPT and Gemini. This trio could potentially redefine how we leverage AI.

So, which is the best AI tool for you? It all depends on your specific requirements. Whether you prioritize conversation or multi-modal capabilities, both ChatGPT 5 and Gemini 2.5 have something to offer.

snippet.title: ChatGPT等のAI回答レベルが30%上がる指示文がヤバい #ChatGPT #チャットGPT #AIツール #AI活用 #時短術 #仕事術 #仕事効率化 #AIプロンプト #shorts
snippet.description:
これで差がつく🫨

ChatGPTは日本語入力よりも英語入力の方が、出力の質が平均30〜40％上がるって言われてます。

でも「英語苦手…」って人も安心。
このプロンプトを使えば👇🏻

日本語で質問しても、
内部では英語で処理 → 日本語で回答してくれるんです🙆‍♂️

実際に使ったら、出力文字数が39％増加して内容も格段に深くなりました。

「これは天才的すぎる…」ってなったやつ😂

1時間かけて作ったので、
この投稿からプロンプトをそのまま使ってOKです🙌🏻✨

AIに“本気で使われない側”になりたくない人は、ぜひ試してみてください🤞🏻

English Summary↓

Did you know that ChatGPT produces up to 30–40% higher-quality output when questions are written in English instead of Japanese?

Even if you’re not fluent in English, there’s a simple solution.
With this custom prompt, you can input in Japanese, let ChatGPT process internally in English, and receive the output back in Japanese.

In my own tests, the response length increased by 39%, and the content became noticeably deeper and more specific.

It took about an hour to design this prompt, but it dramatically improves both accuracy and creativity.
Try it out and experience the difference for yourself.

❍ SNS計14万人／企業支援30件
❍ 1日1分でChatGPT,AI術がスッと身につく
❍ AI×SNSで月5万を生む“仕組み化”を発信
＼AIで“生き方を設計する”時代へ／

===

snippet.title: 🔥 GPT-5 vs Claude Sonnet 4 — Who’s the Better Vibe Coding Partner?
snippet.description:
In this video, we vibe code together and build a Daily Time Tracking Web App — testing how well GPT-5 and Claude Sonnet 4 handle real-world coding challenges.

💻 From UI design to logic implementation, we’ll see:

Which AI understands developer intent better 🧠
Whose code feels cleaner and more efficient ⚙️
Which model gives the better “coding buddy” experience 🎧

Whether you're a frontend dev, a student learning React, or just curious about the latest AI coding tools, this video will give you an honest and fun comparison.

👀 Watch till the end — the results might surprise you!

----------------------------

Here's the prompt:

"I want to create a react web app through which I can analyze the activities where most of my time goes in a day/week

There can be some pre-defined activity tags like - "Office", "Commute", "Learning", "Social media", "Sleep", "Food", "Cooking", "Friends" . "Workout" etc

And there can be an option for the user to create their own tags as well.

The web app should will not have any backend, so we should remember the user's stored choices on local storage.

The web app should give the user an easy interface to quickly select the activity and select the time spend on that activity (roughly hours and minutes and AM/PM), i.e., from - to

And based on the amount of time already input by the user, it should create a pie chart on the right (bottom on mobile screens - to keep the UI responsive) 

for example, if the user only selected these two -

1. Workout - 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM
2. Commute - 9:00 AM to 9.30AM

then, the pie chart can be made on a total of 150 minutes, out of which 120 minutes is for workout and 30 for commute.

It should show today's data, and the local storage should remember a maximum of 7 days. (As soon as the app loads, check the local storage and load the data within 7 days, and remove everything before 7 days). 

Also, it should show tomorrow's data as well (in case user adds a sleep time that crosses a day)
For example, if I add sleep time that goes 11 PM to 6AM, then 11PM-12AM = 1 hour for today and 12 AM to 6AM = 6 hours for tomorrow

There should be an option to switch days 

Please create this React app for me. For local, this app should run on localhost 8080"

-------------------------------

1:00 - 2:00 : LMArena

snippet.title: ChatGPTを家庭教師にする方法【公民編】#解説 #chatgpt #gpt5
snippet.description:
ChatGPTは、憲法・政治・経済など「社会の仕組み」を理解するのに最適なツールです。
この動画では、公民の勉強をChatGPTでどのように進めれば良いかを解説しています。

snippet.title: 🧐👉 OpenAIがGPT-5.1 Miniを極秘テスト中！企業向け新機能と画像生成能力がヤバい！ #QixNewsAI
snippet.description:
OpenAIが極秘でテストしているとされる新モデル「GPT-5.1 Mini」について、最新情報をお届けします！🚀 ChatGPTの企業版で一時的に「GPT-5 Mini Scout」として出現し、JavaScriptライブラリのテストファイルでは「GPT-5.1 Mini」として言及されました。

このモデルは、特に以下の点で注目されています：
- 🏢 **企業向け機能の強化**: ChatGPT TeamおよびEnterprise向けの「Company Knowledge」機能と関連している可能性があり、社内Q&Aや文書管理を効率化します。
- 🎨 **画像生成能力の飛躍的向上**: SVG Robot Benchmarkでは、GPT-5 Mini Thinkingを上回るアニメーションロボット画像を生成。ユニークなデザインも特徴です。

GoogleのGemini 3に対抗するため、OpenAIがこの新モデルを間もなくリリースする可能性が高いと見られています。AIの最前線で何が起きているのか、見逃せませんね！👀✨

snippet.title: 🧐👉 OpenAI tung chiêu mới: GPT-5.1 Mini 'lén lút' xuất hiện, đối đầu Gemini 3? #QixNewsAI
snippet.description:
🔥 OpenAI đang làm gì mà bí mật thế? Một mô hình AI mới toanh, được cho là **GPT-5.1 Mini** (từng xuất hiện dưới tên **GPT-5 Mini Scout**), đã chớp nhoáng lộ diện trên ChatGPT cho tài khoản doanh nghiệp! 🚀

Mô hình này được đồn đoán là 'trái tim' của tính năng **Company Knowledge** mới, giúp các doanh nghiệp quản lý và truy vấn dữ liệu nội bộ hiệu quả hơn bao giờ hết. 💼

Không chỉ vậy, **GPT-5.1 Mini** còn gây sốc với khả năng tạo ảnh động cực kỳ ấn tượng trong bài kiểm tra SVG Robot Benchmark, vượt xa các phiên bản trước đó. Nó có thể tạo ra những hình ảnh robot độc đáo, không theo khuôn mẫu! 🤖✨

Liệu đây có phải là 'át chủ bài' mà OpenAI chuẩn bị tung ra để đối đầu trực diện với **Gemini 3** của Google? 🤔 Với những tiến bộ vượt bậc này, chúng ta có thể mong đợi một cuộc cách mạng trong xử lý dữ liệu doanh nghiệp và sáng tạo hình ảnh trong tương lai gần. Hãy cùng chờ xem! 🗓️

snippet.title: How Europe's AI Power Is Beating Expectations
snippet.description:
Europe is pushing forward with significant strides in AI, fostering open source and innovative AI development. The European Union is seeing new AI technologies integrated across various sectors, signaling its commitment to artificial intelligence and overall technological advancement. This wave of innovation is set to redefine Europe's technological landscape.

Europe just fired back at Big Tech. 🇪🇺
Mistral AI has dropped three new reasoning models — Magistral, Medium 3, and Small 3.1.
They’re open-weight, highly efficient, and built to challenge U.S. AI dominance with smarter, lighter reasoning.
From Paris to Berlin, open-source innovation is heating up — and Mistral might just lead the way. ⚙️✨
